name: Laplace [NIKKE]
description:
Laplace

The leader of Matis, the top squad in Missilis. She more than lives up to her heroic reputation inside the Ark, which goes unquestioned.

YO!

  • "If I can't save this one little girl standing in front of me, how do I deserve to call myself a hero!" - A certain street tier hunter.

  • Wsg guys, today we've got Laplace, I think she's one of the cooler nikkes IMO

  • As always, guys, Enjoy!
creator: ZannyEX
